description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story Bank of America branch with a flat, dark gray roof and black exterior walls. The front facade features a large red sign with white and blue 'BANK OF AMERICA' lettering and the recognizable Bank of America flag logo. There is a glass entrance door and a large window on the front, as well as a red ATM area to the right of the entrance. The side walls are plain black with a single door and a large Bank of America logo, while the rear is unadorned. The building sits on a light gray concrete base, and a human figure is present for scale at the entrance.
description: A modern, single-story Bank of America branch with a flat roof, black walls, prominent signage, and a front-facing ATM area.
description_view_0: Side view showing a black wall with a single door and a large Bank of America logo.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entrance, large signage, glass door, window, and a red ATM area with a person standing nearby.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a black wall, a single door, and a large Bank of America logo.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black wall with no visible features or signage.
attribute_signage: Large red sign with white 'BANK OF AMERICA' text and blue/red flag logo above the entrance; additional large Bank of America flag logos on both side walls.
attribute_entrance_design: Single glass door with metal frame, flanked by a large window and adjacent to a red ATM area; minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality.
